mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.doc_type, v.version_label, v.status, v.summary, v.is_adverse, v.effective_date, v.published_at, v.created_at, v.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM legal_clause c WHERE c.version_id = v.id) AS clause_count FROM legal_document_version v WHERE v.doc_type = #{docType} ORDER BY v.effective_date DESC, v.published_at DESC, v.id DESC
SELECT id, doc_type, version_label, status, summary, is_adverse, effective_date, published_at, admin_id, created_at, updated_at FROM legal_document_version WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, version_id, seq, title, body FROM legal_clause WHERE version_id = #{versionId} ORDER BY seq ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, doc_type, version_label, status, summary, is_adverse, effective_date, published_at, admin_id, created_at, updated_at FROM legal_document_version WHERE doc_type = #{docType} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND effective_date <= NOW() ORDER BY effective_date DESC, published_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM legal_document_version WHERE doc_type = #{docType} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO legal_document_version (doc_type, version_label, status, summary, is_adverse, effective_date, published_at, admin_id) VALUES (#{docType}, #{versionLabel}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{adverse}, #{effectiveDate}, #{publishedAt}, #{adminId})
mapper.update: UPDATE legal_document_version SET version_label = #{versionLabel}, summary = #{summary}, is_adverse = #{isAdverse}, effective_date = #{effectiveDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE legal_document_version SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = NOW(), effective_date = #{effectiveDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO legal_clause (version_id, seq, title, body) VALUES
(#{versionId}, #{c.seq}, #{c.title}, #{c.body})
